creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
Created attachment 257739
patch to fix core dump

This problem is described in https://github.com/pramsey/pgsql-ogr-fdw/issues/263 and has already been fixed, albeit no official version has yet been produced.

The attached patch to the FreeBSD port applies the fix. When committing, the port revision should be increased.

-- Martin
